data.name: Re-Do U
data.detailed_description:
About This Game

Time is repeating itself. Every day, the same moments. The same encounters. The same choices. But this time... something's different.

Can you break the cycle?

TimeLoop is a time-bending visual novel that combines romance, mystery, and the supernatural. Navigate an endless cycle of repeating days where your choices matter more than ever, and where breaking free might mean understanding the connections between four extraordinary women.

FEATURES

• Four Compelling Characters

Each with their own memories of the loop:

- The Freshman: Innocent and curious, she's beginning to remember things she shouldn't. Her memories might hold the key to breaking free.

- The Teacher: Analytical and mysterious, she sees patterns where others see chaos. She believes the answers lie in understanding the loop itself.

- The MILF: Experienced and intuitive, she feels the weight of countless repeated days. Her perspective might be what you need to escape.

- The Cheerleader: Energetic and determined, she refuses to accept being trapped. Together, you might finally break free.

• Time Loop Mechanics

Experience a story where every choice echoes through time, and memories from future loops bleed into the present.

• Multiple Endings

Your choices determine whether you break free, remain trapped, or discover something even more profound about the nature of time itself.

• Atmospheric Locations

Explore the college campus, dorm rooms, library, cafeteria, gym, and more as you piece together the mystery of the time loop.

• Memory & Connection Systems

Build relationships that transcend the loop, where trust and understanding might be the key to freedom.

STORY

Stuck in an endless time loop, you find yourself reliving the same day over and over again. But as the cycles repeat, you begin to notice that four women are also aware of the loop. Each remembers fragments of previous iterations, and together, you might be able to piece together what's causing this temporal anomaly—and how to escape it.

As memories from future loops bleed into the present, relationships deepen in ways that shouldn't be possible. But time itself is fracturing, and the answers lie in understanding not just the loop, but the connections between you and these four extraordinary women.

CONTENT WARNING

This game contains mature themes including romance, adult situations, and supernatural elements. Recommended for mature audiences only.

data.short_description: A time-bending visual novel where you're trapped in an endless loop, reliving the same day with four women who are also aware of the cycle. Build relationships that transcend time as you make choices that echo through multiple iterations to break free from the temporal anomaly.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later (x64)
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOs 10.10 or later
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04.7 or later
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
